emails.subject: Exchange Credit Risk
emails.body: Exchange Credit Risk Tana, Have we received any responses from our overseas affiliates about the exchange/broker credit risk? Have you had any time to put together our domestic exchange list? Paul

emails.subject: Exchange Credit Risk
emails.body: Exchange Credit Risk Tana, Have we received any responses from our overseas affiliates about the exchange/broker credit risk? Have you had any time to put together our domestic exchange list? Paul

emails.subject: Re: Exchange Credit Risk
emails.body: Re: Exchange Credit Risk I have not been getting a response from my outside the U.S. attorneys, so I just emailed them a reminder again, and tried to make them feel really guilty. I hope that works!

emails.subject: Re: Exchange Credit Risk
emails.body: Re: Exchange Credit Risk Nothing like a little guilt. Have you been speaking with my mother? I'll keep my fingers crossed. Thanks.

emails.subject: Re: Exchange Credit Risk
emails.body: Re: Exchange Credit Risk Nothing like a little guilt. Have you been speaking with my mother? I'll keep my fingers crossed. Thanks.

emails.subject: Re: Exchange Credit Risk
emails.body: Re: Exchange Credit Risk Actually, we girls have that built in guilt gene, it just improves with age...but do I need to speak to your mother? Is there anything you would like to confess...?

emails.subject: Re: Exchange Credit Risk
emails.body: Re: Exchange Credit Risk She got it all out of me long ago. I'm thoroughly beaten.
